Package i5.cb.workbench

Class TECommand

  • java.lang.Object
    • i5.cb.workbench.TECommand
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    java.awt.event.ActionListener, java.util.EventListener

    public class TECommand
extends java.lang.Object
implements java.awt.event.ActionListener

    Class: TECommand for CBIva
    Function: Implents ActionListener for the TelosEditor
    See Also:
    TelosEditor, CBIva, ActionListener

      • TECommand

        public TECommand​(int iAnIdentifier,

        iAnIdentifier - Command identification number
        CBclient - a CBIvaClient
        See Also:
        CBIvaClient

      • TECommand

        public TECommand​(TelosEditor teATelosEditor)
        alternativ Constructor
        The iIdentificator is set to iNOT_AVAILABLE. The Constructor is used to creakte a TECommand without a special Command (for WindowListener and MouseListener).
        Parameters:
        teATelosEditor - a TelosEditor
        See Also:
        TelosEditor

      • actionPerformed

        Parameters:
        event - the ActionEvent for the Command
        See Also:
